SEARCH

Package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model

package eu.algites.lib.common.documentation.model
Renderer-neutral documentation element model.

The package contains interfaces and default implementations for a small documentation object tree. The model is intentionally independent from MPS, HTML, Markdown, and any other source or target technology.

Every element type has a read-only AIiDocumentation... interface and a corresponding AIiDocumentation...WriteAccess capability interface. Construction, aggregation, and model-processing code can use write-access interfaces, while validators, renderers, and public consumers can depend only on read-only interfaces. Default AIcDocumentation... implementations implement the corresponding write-access contracts.

The model distinguishes block elements, which form the document structure, from inline elements, which form paragraph-like textual content. Semantic references are represented separately from plain links so renderers can resolve references to documented source objects in an output-specific way.

  • Class
    Description
    AIcDocumentationBlockElement
    Default base implementation of AIiDocumentationBlockElementWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationCodeBlock
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationCodeBlockWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationContainerElement
    Default base implementation of AIiDocumentationContainerElementWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationDocument
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationDocumentWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationElement
    Default base implementation of AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationInlineCode
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationInlineCodeWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationInlineElement
    Default base implementation of AIiDocumentationInlineElementWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationLineBreak
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationLineBreakWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationLink
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationLinkWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationParagraph
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationReference
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationReferenceWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationReferenceTarget
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationReferenceTargetWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationSection
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationSectionWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationTable
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationTableWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationTableCell
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationTableCellWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationTableColumn
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationTableColumnWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationTableRow
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationTableRowWriteAccess.
    AIcDocumentationText
    Default implementation of AIiDocumentationTextWriteAccess.
    AIiDocumentationBlockElement
    Represents a block-level documentation element.
    AIiDocumentationBlockElementWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a block-level documentation element.
    AIiDocumentationCodeBlock
    Represents a standalone code block.
    AIiDocumentationCodeBlockWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a code block.
    AIiDocumentationContainerElement
    Represents a block-level documentation element that can contain child blocks.
    AIiDocumentationContainerElementWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a block-level documentation container.
    AIiDocumentationDocument
    Represents the root of a documentation element tree.
    AIiDocumentationDocumentWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a documentation document.
    AIiDocumentationElement
    Represents a common renderer-neutral documentation element.
    AIiDocumentationElementWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a renderer-neutral documentation element.
    AIiDocumentationInlineCode
    Represents inline code inside textual content.
    AIiDocumentationInlineCodeWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a inline code element.
    AIiDocumentationInlineElement
    Represents an inline documentation element.
    AIiDocumentationInlineElementWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a inline documentation element.
    AIiDocumentationLineBreak
    Represents an explicit line break inside inline content.
    AIiDocumentationLineBreakWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a line break element.
    AIiDocumentationLink
    Represents a non-semantic inline link.
    AIiDocumentationLinkWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a link element.
    AIiDocumentationParagraph
    Represents a paragraph with ordered inline content.
    AIiDocumentationParagraphWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a documentation paragraph.
    AIiDocumentationReference
    Represents a semantic inline reference to another documented object.
    AIiDocumentationReferenceTarget
    Represents a renderer-neutral target of a semantic documentation reference.
    AIiDocumentationReferenceTargetWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a semantic reference target.
    AIiDocumentationReferenceWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a semantic reference element.
    AIiDocumentationSection
    Represents a hierarchical documentation section.
    AIiDocumentationSectionWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a documentation section.
    AIiDocumentationTable
    Represents a tabular block element.
    AIiDocumentationTableCell
    Represents a cell in a documentation table row.
    AIiDocumentationTableCellWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a documentation table cell.
    AIiDocumentationTableColumn
    Represents metadata of a documentation table column.
    AIiDocumentationTableColumnWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a table column.
    AIiDocumentationTableRow
    Represents a row in a documentation table.
    AIiDocumentationTableRowWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a documentation table row.
    AIiDocumentationTableWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a documentation table.
    AIiDocumentationText
    Represents plain inline text.
    AIiDocumentationTextWriteAccess
    Provides write access to a text element.
